products.name: Farmako Agourelaio
products.subtitle: Early Harvest Extra Virgin Olive Oil
products.description: Pressed from unripe green olives at peak harvest, Farmako Agourelaio delivers an intensely fruited, peppery oil rich in polyphenols, vitamins, and natural antioxidants. More potent than conventional extra virgin — a true Mediterranean superfood.
products.longDescription: Farmako Agourelaio is crafted from unripe olives — harvested before full maturity to capture maximum polyphenol content and therapeutic benefit. A great source of vitamins and minerals, it supports heart health, immune function, and daily wellness. Perfect as a finishing oil, in salads, soups, or taken neat as a daily supplement.

products.subtitle: Wild-Harvested Mediterranean Sea Salt
